data.body: G3 container coverage review (parent 3fe1 + this close-out child): clean. This child covers parent AC5 (allowlist emptied; make lint + full test suite pass) and parent SC3 (fresh joe-janitor audit finds no unguarded blind-except cluster; new violations fail CI). Remaining parent criteria are covered by siblings (substrate=8fbd, exemplar+lint enable=16a1, sweeps=8d01/d360/ceaa/fd72/0569, narrowing-bug-fix=exemplar/sweeps). No uncovered parent criterion attributable to this pairing.
